title: BoatCam Hotkeys
description: A small add-on mod for BoatCam that adds hotkeys for pitch you can use as you play!
body:
To be used with [https://modrinth.com/mod/boatcam](https://modrinth.com/mod/boatcam) or [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/boatcam](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/boatcam).

This mod adds 5 hotkeys you can configure in the mod menu. Each hotkey can have a pitch assigned to it which will be applied when you press the hotkey associated with it.
